hints: Verbo: Haber (auxiliar para presente perfecto continuo)
hintDisplay: Sujeto: Yo / Verbo: Haber (auxiliar para presente perfecto continuo) / Verbo: Estar (auxiliar para aspecto continuo) / Verbo: Empacar (acción principal) / Complemento: Para mis viajes / Tiempo: Recientemente
spanishSentence: No he estado empacando recientemente para mis viajes.
correctSentence: I haven't been packing recently for my trips.

hints: Complemento: los sistemas de la aeronave

correctSentence: The pilot hasn't been monitoring the aircraft systems since we took off.

correctSentence: I haven't been recommending this route to tourists lately because the roads have been under construction.
